headline: Shares of banks and financial services stocks are trading lower as the ongoing Middle East conflict drives oil prices higher and heightens inflation concerns, weighing on broader market sentiment. A stronger dollar and diminishing expectations for future rate cuts are adding further pressure on the sector.

headline: Capital One's Acquisition Of Discover Won't Save It From Declining ROE & ROA
summary: Capital One (COF) rated Strong Sell: 11.6% downside to $160.90 fair value as ROE/ROA and efficiency worsen post-Discover.

headline: Atlassian Cuts 10% Of Global Workforce Amid AI Shift, Cites Change In 'Number Of Roles Required'
summary: Atlassian announced a 10% workforce cut due to AI impact on business. Other companies also cutting jobs due to AI concerns.
